channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - AI & Machine Learning
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: AI & Machine Learning

item.title: Gastrointestinal endoscopic image classification using a hybrid modified inception network and a customized vision transformer with tree growth feature selection.
item.description: Scientific reports - The Gastrointestinal (GI) tract plays a vital role in digestion by breaking down food into essential nutrients. Disorders such as bleeding lesions, ulcerative colitis, Inflammatory Bowel Disease (I...

item.title: Path beyond the blind end-unravel the imaging spectrum of appendiceal pathologies.
item.description: Abdominal radiology (New York) - Review - The appendix is involved in a diverse spectrum of inflammatory, infectious, benign, and malignant conditions that extend far beyond acute appendicitis. Although acute appendicitis remains the most ...

item.title: Artificial Intelligence-Based Localization of Small Bowel Anatomic Transition Zones in Crohn's Disease Using Capsule Endoscopy.
item.description: Endoscopy international open - Background Small bowel (SB) capsule endoscopy (SBCE) is a key tool for Crohn's disease (CD), but interpretation is time-consuming. Artificial intelligence (AI) could assist, yet automated SB segmen...

item.title: Deep learning-based quantitative histopathology of endoscopic biopsies in Crohn's disease: a retrospective cross-sectional validation study.
item.description: Frontiers in immunology - Crohn's disease (CD) shows marked histopathologic heterogeneity, and conventional histologic assessment remains dependent on subjective visual evaluation, limiting reproducibility and objective qua...
